LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANTS ALAN KO, TOM YAMAMOTO, BILL BILLINGHAM, ROBERT LEE, 246 SECOND STREET OWNERS ASSOCIATION, AND, ARMAND HACOBIAN DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. ARGUED AND THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEMURRER OVERRULED, TEN DAYS LEAVE TO ANSWER. COMPLAINT IS FILED WITHIN THE APPLICABLE FOUR YEAR STATUTE OF LIMITATIONS. CUTUJIAN VS. BENEDICT HILLS ESTATES ASSOC. (1996) 41 CAL.APP. 4TH 1379, 1384-1385. COMPLAINT SUFFICIENTLY PLED TO SURVIVE A DEMURRER. SECTION 4.7 OF THE CC&RS DISCUSSES WATER LEAKS THAT DAMAGE ANOTHER UNIT AND COOPERATION WITH THE ASSOCIATION IN THE INSPECTION AND CORRECTION OF THE PROBLEM. (PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER.) JUDGE: CHARLOTTE WALTER WOOLARD; COURT REPORTER: MARY ELLEN SCHERER CSR #5208

RULING: No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling - Grant, no opposition filed. (PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER.) (302/CWW) JUDGE: CHARLOTTE WALTER WOOLARD, REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR #8600

Off Calendar May-10-2010 Continued To Jun-25-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Mar-05-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANTS ALAN KO, TOM YAMAMOTO, BILL BILLINGHAM, ROBERT LEE, 246 SECOND STREET OWNERS ASSOCIATION, and, ARMAND HACOBIAN DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. Appearances: Kimberly S. Love, Esq. of Drummond & Associates (415) 433-2261 appearing for Plaintiff and opposing party; Ann Rankin, Esq. Attorney at Law, (510) 653-8886 appearing for Defendants and Moving party. Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Demurrer overruled, ten days leave to answer. Complaint is filed within the applicable four year statute of limitations. Cutujian vs. Benedict Hills Estates Assoc. (1996) 41 Cal.App. 4th 1379, 1384-1385. Complaint sufficiently pled to survive a demurrer. Section 4.7 of the CC&Rs discusses water leaks that damage another Unit and cooperation with the Association in the inspection and correction of the problem. (Prevailing party to prepare a form of order.) (302/CWW)Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard; Court Reporter: Mary Ellen Scherer CSR # 5208
